lines.text: Year 1157 POST-COLLAPSE. Planet Dezolis, outer rim.
The Bane devours the stars one by one. Tonight... one fell to earth.

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.text: Kael, this stasis pod — it's still active! After four centuries, something in here is alive.

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.text: We're deep in Shadowbeast territory. Whatever's in there, we wake it fast or not at all.

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.text: Look at these readings — a CAST unit, pre-Collapse. I'm cycling the release. Stand ready!

lines.speaker: ARIEL
lines.text: ...Temporal displacement confirmed. 412-year gap. Unit ARIEL-7 online. Scanning environment.

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.text: It's... a CAST android. From the old world.

lines.speaker: ARIEL
lines.text: You are the first biologicals I've encountered since the Collapse. The Bane must be stopped. I carry coordinates to the Stellar Archive — pre-Collapse data that holds the weapon to end this darkness.

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.text: Then we get you out of here. Right now!

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.text: Shadowbeasts. Pack of them, closing fast. Get ready!

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.text: ...That's the last of them. For now.

lines.speaker: ARIEL
lines.text: The Stellar Archive is on Motavia. Across the void. The Bane has not yet reached it.

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.text: Then we need a ship. And a way off this dying world.
